column1: Data for 2019 to 2023 are for visits by UK residents, data for 2024 onwards are for visits by Great Britain residents [definitions 1, 2]
Shorthand is used in this table:
Q1 = Quarter 1 (Jan to Mar), Q2 = Quarter 2 (Apr to June), Q3 = Quarter 3 (July to Sept), Q4 = Quarter 4 (Oct to Dec).
P = provisional estimates, B = break in time series where estimates change from UK to Great Britain.

[c] = estimates based on a small number of respondents (less than 3), [x] = estimates are not available, [low] = estimates that would appear as zero in these rounded tables, [z] = estimates are not applicable.
Notes and definitions are referred to, the text for these can be found on the corresponding worksheets.
